title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE RAMOS-PURA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF RAMOS AND PURA, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3935 / 102 OG No. 41, 6812 (Oct. 9, 2006)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9350, August 04, 2006 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE RAMOS-PURA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF RAMOS AND PURA, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Ramos - Pura Road in the municipality of Ramos and Pura, Province of Tarlac, consisting of 4.7 kilometers, more or less, is hereby converted into a national road.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of the Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 29, 2006 and April 3, 2996, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: Aug. 04, 2006

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
